recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: Danny Trejo plays 'Bullet' a tough cop who takes the law into his own hands when his grandson is kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Shockwave: Countdown to Disaster
recommendations.overview: A stolen seismic weapon is activated in Yemen. A hostage freed there tries in vain to warn against its global effect. It starts seismic activity at the Californian fault line where her daughter and ex are monitoring it. Can they stop it?

recommendations.title: Zombie Apocalypse
recommendations.genres: Action, Horror, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Months after a zombie plague has wiped out 90 percent of the American population, a small group of survivors fight their way cross-country to a rumored refuge on the island of Catalina.

recommendations.title: Rise of the Zombies
recommendations.overview: When zombies overrun San Francisco, a desperate group survives by locking themselves inside Alcatraz Prison. When the undead breach the island, our heroes are forced to return to the mainland overrun with the undead.

recommendations.title: Species: The Awakening
recommendations.overview: A scientist, Dr Hollander, takes his niece Miranda to Mexico in an attempt to reverse the effects of the alien DNA he used to create her. However the treatment goes horribly wrong, and sets Miranda on a killing spree as she sets out to find a mate.

recommendations.title: Titanic
recommendations.overview: 101-year-old Rose DeWitt Bukater tells the story of her life aboard the Titanic, 84 years later. A young Rose boards the ship with her mother and fiancé. Meanwhile, Jack Dawson and Fabrizio De Rossi win third-class tickets aboard the ship. Rose tells

recommendations.title: Titanic II
recommendations.overview: On the 100th anniversary of the original voyage, a modern luxury liner christened "Titanic 2," follows the path of its namesake. But when a tsunami hurls an ice berg into the new ship's path, the passengers and crew must fight to avoid a similar fate

recommendations.title: Going Overboard
recommendations.overview: A struggling young comedian takes a menial job on a cruise ship where he hopes for his big chance to make it in the world of cruise ship comedy.

recommendations.title: Doctor Who: Voyage of the Damned
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, TV Movie, Mystery, Drama, Thriller
recommendations.overview: When disaster hits the Titanic, the Doctor uncovers a threat to the whole human race. Battling alongside aliens, saboteurs, robot Angels and a new friend called Astrid, can he stop the Christmas inferno?

recommendations.title: Ghost Ship
